hero.headline: One platform. Every module of your operation.
hero.subheadline: SRM, CRM, CLM, Procurement and Risk Management running on the same data, permissions and visual identity — no fragile integrations between disconnected systems.

bento.auditBody: Every sensitive event logged — who, when, tenant, action.

dashboardPage.subtitle: Here's a quick overview of your workspace.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: You'll be the first admin — invite your team afterwards.
onboarding.taxIdHint: Used to detect if your company is already on BusinessHub.
onboarding.zipHint: For Brazilian postal codes, this fills the address automatically.
onboarding.consentLabel: I have read and accept BusinessHub's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
onboarding.consentLabelAdmin: I understand I'll be the administrator of this organization — I'll be able to approve new members, and this role can't be revoked by anyone on my team, only by the BusinessHub platform. I have read and accept the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
onboarding.consentRequired: You must accept the terms to continue.
onboarding.slugHint: This will be your team's own address on BusinessHub.
onboarding.slugInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
onboarding.slugTaken: That address is already taken — try another.
onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.pendingBody: Your company is already on BusinessHub. We notified the admins — you'll get access once someone approves your request.
onboarding.pendingNewCompanyBody: We received the request to create {name} on BusinessHub. Once the platform approves it, your workspace will be available at {domain}.

tenantLanding.subtitle: {name}'s workspace on BusinessHub.
tenantLanding.notFoundBody: This address doesn't exist or is no longer available.
tenantLanding.heroSubheadline: Register your company and stay informed about upcoming material and service supply opportunities.
tenantLanding.formSubtitle: Fill in your details — our team will reach out if a matching opportunity comes up.
tenantLanding.formErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
tenantLanding.formSuccessBody: Check your email and confirm it. Then log in and complete your company's onboarding.

supplierOnboarding.title: Supplier Onboarding
supplierOnboarding.subtitle: Fill in the information below to complete your supplier registration with {name}.
supplierOnboarding.emptyBody: {name}'s team is still setting up the registration form. Please check back soon.
supplierOnboarding.notMemberBody: We couldn't find your supplier record for this company. Please contact support.
supplierOnboarding.cnpjChecksumWarning: The check digits don't match — please double-check the CNPJ.
supplierOnboarding.formsMenuSubtitle: {name} has more than one intake form — choose which one to fill out.

companyLogo.title: Company logo
companyLogo.hint: PNG or JPG, up to 1000x1000px and 5MB.
companyLogo.errorGeneric: Couldn't upload the image. Please try again.

adminPage.title: Administration
adminPage.subtitle: People waiting for access to your organization.
adminPage.noAccess: You don't have permission to view this page.
adminPage.onboardingFieldsSubtitle: Configure the fields suppliers fill in when joining the platform.
adminPage.onboardingFormPreviewSubtitle: Drag a field's right edge to resize it — narrower fields automatically line up side by side.
adminPage.onboardingFormPreviewHint: Layout preview — the fields here aren't interactive.
adminPage.onboardingFieldMaskTooltipLiteral: Appears on its own — the supplier doesn't type it
adminPage.onboardingFieldMaskTooltipCnpjNote: This is the CNPJ pattern. With this mask, the system automatically checks whether the last two digits are correct — without blocking submission if they're wrong.
adminPage.onboardingFieldMaskTooltipDateDigit: Day, month or year digit — the letters just help you remember the order
adminPage.onboardingFieldMaskTooltipDateNote: This is how the supplier types the date, in whatever format you choose — e.g. 22/07/2026.
adminPage.onboardingFieldOptionCategoryHint: Start typing to reuse a category already used in this list, or type a new one.
adminPage.onboardingFieldDuplicateKeyError: A similar field already exists — choose a different label.
adminPage.submissionsSubtitle: Answers submitted by suppliers during onboarding.
adminPage.onboardingFormsSubtitle: Create a different form for each supplier category.
adminPage.onboardingFormDeleteWarning: This deletes the form, its fields, and any submissions already sent. This can't be undone.
adminPage.supplierUsersSubtitle: People who created a supplier account for this company.
adminPage.supplierUsersLoadError: Couldn't load suppliers. Please try again.
adminPage.pendingCompaniesSectionSubtitle: Company creation requests awaiting platform approval.
adminPage.pendingCompaniesLoadError: Couldn't load requests. Please try again.
adminPage.allCompaniesSectionSubtitle: Every company on the platform, active or awaiting approval.
adminPage.allCompaniesLoadError: Couldn't load companies. Please try again.
adminPage.allCompaniesDeleteWarning: This deletes the company and all its data (suppliers, forms, submissions). This can't be undone.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Your personal account information.
profilePage.emailHint: Contact an admin to change your email.
profilePage.avatarError: Couldn't upload the image. Try a smaller file (up to 2MB).

login.title: Log in to BusinessHub
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before logging in — check the link we sent to your inbox.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Set up access to your organization's workspace.
signup.successBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.placeholder: This content will be published soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.placeholder: This content will be published soon.
